prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年复旦大学在北京（综合类）最低录取位次分别为约763名→807名→1066名→872名→742名，整体呈波动走势。2023年出现明显后移（1066名），2024–2025年迅速回升，2025年基准位次约742名，为近5年最优水平；该校在北京招生计划持续扩增：2021年26人、2022年26人、2023年28人、2024年32人、2025年33人；2026年计划招生39人，较2025年增加6人（+18.2%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第6名，2022–2026年连续稳居第5名，属于全国顶尖高校阵营，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风、学校管理事件），但2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++等科研成果）；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续高位；第五轮学科评估中，复旦大学A-及以上学科达27个，包括数学A+、物理学A+、新闻传播学A+、理论经济学A+、政治学A+、中国语言文学A+、临床医学A、计算机科学与技术A等，学科实力极为突出，对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业持续高热推荐；北京2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增加约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学位于上海（非本省），北京考生跨省报考需考虑地域偏好；该校在北京招生计划逐年增加，2026年扩至39人，对北京考生较为友好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次742名、2026年扩招18.2%（缓解竞争）、北京考生总数大增29.7%（加剧竞争）、抖音高热关注度以及顶尖学科实力等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约843名，区间742–944名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划/光子计划院士班/相辉计划）
- 金融学（FinTech全英文课程班）
- 经济学类（拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（新工科拔尖班/大数据班/电子信息班/微电子班/集成电路领军人才班）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖人才试验班）
- 数学类（拔尖学生培养基地）
- 自然科学实验班（拔尖学生培养基地）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（拔尖学生培养基地）
- 法学（卓越法律人才基地）
- 社会科学试验班
- 新闻学（望道新闻卓越班）
- 人文科学试验班（拔尖学生培养基地）
- 英语（含英语、翻译）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间742–944名内，建议以二档为主力报考方向（新工科、计算机、数学类等），一档顶尖试验班可作为冲刺目标（相辉学堂、FinTech等），三档人文社科类专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<742名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Fudan University in Beijing (Comprehensive category) were approximately 763 → 807 → 1066 → 872 → 742, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (1066), but it quickly rebounded in 2024–2025, with the baseline ranking in 2025 at about 742, the best level in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing has been continuously expanding: 26 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 33 in 2025. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 39, an increase of 6 (+18.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 6th in 2021 and has consistently ranked 5th from 2022 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities in the country, which strongly attracts high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics and school management incidents), but in 2025, its reputation was positive (e.g., A++ in Journalism and Communication for research achievements). It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University had 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, Physics, Journalism and Communication, Theoretical Economics, Political Science, and Chinese Language and Literature, as well as A in Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended. The total number of Beijing college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai (not within the province), so Beijing students applying across provinces need to consider regional preferences. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing has been increasing year by year, expanding to 39 in 2026, which is relatively friendly to Beijing students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 742, the 18.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the 29.7% increase in Beijing student registrations (intensifying competition), high Douyin attention, and top disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 843, with a range of 742–944.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan/Photon Plan Academician Class/Xianghui Plan)
- Finance (FinTech Full English Course Class)
- Economics (Top-Notch Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (New Engineering Top-Notch Class/Big Data Class/Electronic Information Class/Microelectronics Class/Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top-Notch Talent Experimental Class)
- Mathematics (Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Natural Science Experimental Class (Top-Notch Student Training Base).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Economics (Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Law (Excellent Legal Talent Base)
- Social Science Experimental Class
- Journalism (Wangdao Journalism Excellence Class)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- English (including English and Translation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 742–944, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction (New Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics, etc.), with Tier 1 top experimental classes as sprint targets (Xianghui Academy, FinTech, etc.), and Tier 3 humanities and social science majors as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<742), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
